title: 401 Unauthorized error when using cookie for API authentication
symptom: When making an API call with a cookie for authentication, n8n returns a 401 Unauthorized error. This issue does not occur when using the same request in Postman.
not_this_if: The API call works in Postman
root_cause: The 401 Unauthorized error typically indicates that the authentication credentials provided are invalid or not recognized by the server. In this case, the issue was due to an incorrect URL format in the API call, which led to the server not recognizing the request as valid.
fix_steps: Check the API endpoint URL for correctness
Ensure the URL matches the format used in successful requests (e.g., 'https://development.')
Retry the API call with the corrected URL
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the API endpoint URL to match the expected format.
